title: Candidate 7 stable-byte-source-getter-reentry sync compression can read stale JS-backed input
unsafe_operation: parse_compress_buffer_and_options captures StringOrBuffer input, sync compression option getters can reenter JS, then gzip_or_deflate_sync or JSZstd::compress_sync materializes buffer.slice() for native compression
invariant: Sync compression must not read bytes from caller-controlled JS backing storage after options getter reentry can mutate, resize, detach, or replace that storage
safe_caller: Bun.gzipSync, Bun.deflateSync, or Bun.zstdCompressSync with a BufferSource input and an options getter that mutates or replaces the backing storage after input capture
fix_boundary: Parse sync compression options before input capture, or re-fetch/copy BufferSource bytes after getter reentry before native compression reads
pr_aperture: Sync compression getter-reentry only: Bun.gzipSync, Bun.deflateSync, and Bun.zstdCompressSync; do not include async compression, crypto, fs, markdown, S3, TextDecoder, or decompression broadening
fix_options: Move sync compression option parsing ahead of StringOrBuffer::from_js so JS getter reentry happens before the input descriptor is captured
Alternatively re-fetch and snapshot BufferSource bytes after option getter reentry and before buffer.slice() reaches native compression
Preserve current error ordering and Node-compatible empty-input behavior while changing only the stale-byte window
do_not_touch: Do not patch Bun.zstdCompress, Bun.zstdDecompress, crypto, fs, markdown, S3, TextDecoder, or unrelated stable-byte families in this PR
Do not reject SharedArrayBuffer, resizable ArrayBuffer, or other BufferSource inputs unless compatibility evidence requires that policy
Do not claim analyzer discovery, proof of UB, Miri-clean status, site execution proof, or policy readiness from this manual packet

evidence.summary: Manual route pins input capture at parse_compress_buffer_and_options lines 2345-2347, sync gzip/deflate option getter reentry at lines 2622-2645, gzip native-read slice materialization at line 2656, zstd level getter reentry at lines 2764-2779, and zstd native-read slice materialization at line 2817
evidence.limitation: source trace only; does not prove the safe JS route is observable or fixed

evidence.summary: External Bun scout witness exercised sync compression with an options getter mutating captured BufferSource storage and reported observable red behavior for the observable-red-green proof-mode bar
evidence.limitation: runtime witness only; not analyzer-discovered, not proof of UB, and not a general site-execution claim

evidence.summary: Node comparison records the post-getter empty-input oracle and compatibility shape for the same sync compression option-getter route
evidence.limitation: comparison oracle only; does not prove Bun memory safety or make a policy-ready compatibility claim

trust_boundary: manual candidate; not analyzer-discovered; not proof of repository safety
